title: Additional USD 29 Million in Tax Credits for Manufacturing Expansion in Michigan
content: Nel ASA's subsidiary has secured up to USD 29 million in additional investment tax credits under the 48C program, funded by the Inflation Reduction Act, to support its planned electrolyser manufacturing expansion in Michigan. The tax credits, covering 30% of qualifying investments, are conditional on meeting wage and apprenticeship requirements. Combined with previous grants and credits, Nel has now received nearly USD 200 million in support from the state of Michigan and the U.S. Department of Energy.
author: Analysts Account
